rag_rules: Latched expressions must be used only in component implementations, not in component types
Binary expressions in AGREE must have matching types on both sides of the operator
Assignment operators in AGREE require valid expression types and proper scoping
generic_rules: AGREE contracts must be placed in appropriate scopes: component types for assumptions/guarantees, implementations for bindings
Guarantee expressions must reference only visible identifiers or locally declared helpers
Type mismatches in AGREE are resolved by ensuring consistent scalar types (int, real, bool) in declarations and expressions
syntax_or_pattern_reminders: AGREE annexes are enclosed in `annex agree {** ... **};` blocks
Use initialized temporal recurrence for stateful equations: `0.0 -> pre(t) + step`
Branching logic in AGREE uses nested `if ... then ... else` expressions
anti_patterns: Avoid using implementation-only subcomponent ports in component type contracts
Do not mix incompatible types in binary expressions without explicit conversion
irrelevant_topics: Component type annexes vs implementation annexes
